textByHash.2c5a99435d5a46bbef56a0ca6059df93b0c90a3b: Here. I can hardly charge you for an empty box.
textByHash.3ce8929d0e73001563493448e8338e4274be1722: You've got your special mayoral fishbowl and tiny net. Just grab a fish from one of the aquariums with the net, and that is our new mayor.
textByHash.443af0d3a7b29a63ee96380f72781bc8a7c225bf: There you go. Once you've caught the mayor, be sure to take him to Arhein to make sure he's happy. Just don't take too long. They don't seem to have a long life span...
textByHash.56235986f967e8ae2872119b3469a585464a81ff: I can sell you the whole kit for 50 coins.
textByHash.573f95137faec3643dfcd3c4f8a0fe339c4e015e: I think you dropped your net and fishbowl. Don't worry, I picked them up for you. Just make soom room for them and I'll give them back.
textByHash.5bd2747c74347e46942e84b270b6ab0eb9e926e0: Oh, we've lost another one have we?
textByHash.5e2416f2f527cdfeae109f98605e3c54e54c395f: I see you've caught a new one. You'd best show him to Arhein. Just don't take too long. They don't seem to have a long life span...
textByHash.788a431f8751a25fb2cfe8ce840cf5a1d247c7e6: Well, it's easy to fix. You just need a special mayoral fishbowl and a tiny net. Once you have them, grab a fish from one of the aquariums with the net, and that is our new mayor.
textByHash.82d91470d587ac23142866ef6082576f5db357ad: Welcome! If you're looking for fishing equipment, you're in the right place. I'll also give you a good price on any fish that you want to sell.
textByHash.8e3094024430579295171d8602bb3065d02c0067: Sorry, I'm all out. I used up the last of it feeding the fish in the aquarium.
textByHash.8e9864ca9033c8e0262f4ffd58a2c647ac168a86: I can sell you the whole kit for 50 coins. Just come back once you've got enough room.
textByHash.a1621e3d154042d261ad042194dd13e3900cc1a9: Well, I'll be happy to give you the net once you have the cash, but not before!
textByHash.a2d04841bf82fedf5bc039846aa5aab495515b0e: I can see that you have a nicely filled fishbowl there to use, and you can catch a fish from my aquarium if you want.
textByHash.b434fe94aa3506de9983aef0786d17a9e6f3a4cf: You will need a special net to do this though, and I sell them for 10 gold.
textByHash.b60dfeb73003f78a203948fd82d668bf6cf0066e: I think you dropped these. Good job I noticed and picked them up for you. Now, go grab a fish from one of the aquariums with the net, and that is our new mayor.
textByHash.bb18de31a9a986b0c5293e122bbea537189f0061: Yes, the fish seem to like it. Come and see me when you have put some in the bowl.
textByHash.c186834fa4db56ea09d2482c9bc78cd523281bfc: I have some empty boxes though, they have the ingredients written on the back. I'm sure if you pick up a pestle and mortar you will be able to make your own.
textByHash.c93f9644af22eea4c68a3e7770cd338a78989265: Sorry, you need to put some seaweed into the bowl first.
textByHash.d53785020dfc55321d62db4ae40118b6e087db2b: Welcome, you can buy fishing equipment at my store. We'll also give you a good price for any fish that you catch.
